Executive Summary:
Revenue for Q4 reached $4.2M, a 15% increase YoY. Key accounts include Microsoft (contact: Lisa Park, lisa.park@microsoft.com) and Amazon Web Services (contact: Kevin Nguyen, knguyen@amazon.com, phone: (206) 266-1000).
